lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including multiple dents and rust. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. Mechanical systems are unreliable and require major repairs.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips and light surface scratches. The interior is well-maintained with slight wear on the driver's seat. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are in good working order.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy again. The exterior has substantial rust on the wheel wells and rocker panels, along with several deep scratches and a large dent on the passenger door. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a persistent oil leak and a loud exhaust, and the transmission is starting to slip between second and third gear. The interior shows heavy wear, with torn upholstery and a headliner that is sagging. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited for a mechanic or as a parts vehicle.

Experience reliability at a great value! This vehicle is in fair condition, showing some honest wear and tear from its time on the road, but it still runs strong and is ready for its next adventure. It’s a practical, hardworking choice for anyone looking for a dependable daily driver that gets the job done!

This vehicle is in impeccable, mint condition, appearing as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and absolutely no chips, scratches, or dents. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows no signs of wear, and all electronic features and climate controls function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service record. It drives exceptionally smoothly and offers a 'like-new' experience for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances performance with sophisticated aesthetics. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and roadworthiness. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior, this offering represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver who prioritizes quality and longevity.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car to own! It's in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for all your road trips and daily commutes. I've taken great care of it, and it still looks and drives wonderfully. If you're looking for a dependable vehicle that’s ready to hit the road today, this is the one!

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility, presenting a well-cared-for aesthetic that stands out on the road. Up for sale is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies. This example is paired with the tactile Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and all electronic features—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Recent updates include a fresh set of high-performance tires and a new battery, ensuring this car is road-trip ready. It drives straight, brakes firmly, and offers a quiet, composed ride. Whether you're commuting or exploring the open road, this car delivers reliability and style without compromise.

This E46 M3 is a driver’s specimen, featuring the high-revving S54 power plant with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag six-speed manual and a functional limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes reinforced subframe mounts and refreshed rod bearings. Suspension geometry is enhanced by Bilstein B16 dampers, providing exceptional lateral grip and communicative feedback. While showing honest signs of use, the mechanical integrity remains high, with linear power delivery and a visceral exhaust note.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance up to date. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between daily utility and refined comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy luster, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, such as tiny stone chips consistent with a well-loved car. All electronic features, including the high-fidelity sound system, dual-zone climate control, and navigation, function exactly as they should. This driver-focused machine features a high-revving 3.2L S54 inline-six engine mated to a precise 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis has been enhanced with subframe reinforcement and fresh polyurethane bushings to maintain structural rigidity during high-lateral-G cornering. Performance is anchored by a factory-spec limited-slip differential and a recently recalibrated VANOS system, ensuring a broad power band and immediate throttle response. While the paint displays minor stone chips from spirited road use, the mechanical vitals are excellent, including a recent valve adjustment and a cooling system overhaul. This is a mechanically sound, analog athlete ready for the canyons or the track.
Well-maintained used car. Good condition. Clean title. Reliable engine. Serious buyers only.

Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, reflecting a history of consistent, documented maintenance. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. With recent brake service and tires that show significant tread life, this car is mechanically sound and ready for the road. It has been garage-kept and smoke-free, ensuring it looks and smells as fresh as it drives.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and reliability.
